_comment: No baseline numbers recorded yet. The CI bench-cpu-advisory job runs `uv run pytest tests/bench/ -m bench --benchmark-only --benchmark-compare=tests/bench/baseline_cpu.json` and currently has nothing to compare against — the gate is paper. To populate: run the suite on the standard CI machine, capture the JSON output via --benchmark-json=, and replace this file. See tests/bench/README.md.
